# Timolol 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Timolol 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Timolol</strong> 目前有 <strong>20 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Timolol 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Reduction of intraocular pressure (IOP) in patients with open-angle glaucoma or ocular hypertension who are insufficiently responsive to topical beta-blockers or prostaglandin analogues.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>primary hereditary glaucoma（98.6%）</li>
<li>open-angle glaucoma（98.2%）</li>
<li>closed-angle glaucoma（97.2%）</li>
<li>malignant renovascular hypertension（94.5%）</li>
<li>malignant hypertensive renal disease（94.5%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension with unclear multifactorial mechanism（93.7%）</li>
<li>pulmonary hypertension owing to lung disease and/or hypoxia（93.7%）</li>
<li>hypertensive disorder（93.7%）</li>
<li>Braddock syndrome（92.6%）</li>
<li>chronic pulmonary heart disease（87.8%）</li>
<li>glaucoma 1, open angle（86.5%）</li>
<li>angle-closure glaucoma（85.5%）</li>
<li>congenital glaucoma（78.9%）</li>
<li>aqueous misdirection（76.7%）</li>
<li>traumatic glaucoma（76.7%）</li>
<li>glaucomatous atrophy of optic disc（74.7%）</li>
<li>faciodigitogenital syndrome（73.8%）</li>
<li>neovascular glaucoma（73.1%）</li>
<li>distal myopathy, Tateyama type（71.8%）</li>
<li>trichotillomania（71.0%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/timolol/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
